Committee Ethics Committee In higher education ethical behaviour is essential for maintaining the integrity of academic institutions and ensuring that students, faculty, and staff are treated fairly and equitably. Ethical conduct is also essential in promoting public trust in higher education and its contribution to society.Ethics in the education system covers a broad range of issues like academic honesty, research integrity, equal opportunity, student welfare, gender sensitivity and institutional governance. These issues of often complex and require careful consideration and attention to ensure that ethical principles are upheld. The success of any educational Institute depends upon the Ethical behaviour of its state holders. For effective ethical practice, the support and training of all stakeholders are required. Being an Educational Institute, it is our responsibility to provide an environment that fosters ethical development and encourages students to become responsible and engaged citizens. Then only we can create a good human being, a good society, and a Good Nation.
